title: Better craftable beacons
description: A simple mod that adds two crafting recipes for the nether star so you can easily craft a beacon early without having to kill the wither
body:
**Better Craftable Beacons** is a lightweight quality-of-life mod designed for players who want the benefits of a beacon without the repetitive hassle of fighting the Wither boss every time. Whether you need a full beacon setup or just want to craft decorative Nether Stars, this mod adds balanced, high-value recipes to the game.


### Features & Recipes


This mod introduces three simple crafting recipes to your survival world:

-     Craft a Nether Star (Ender Variant): Combine 4 Diamond Blocks and 1 Eye of Ender.
  
-     Craft a Nether Star (Glowstone Variant): Combine 4 Diamond Blocks and 1 Glowstone Block.
  
-     Duplicate a Nether Star: Already have a star? Turn 4 Diamonds and 1 Nether Star into 2 Nether Stars.

Perfect for peaceful players, builders who need multiple beacons, or server owners looking for a balanced alternative to Wither farming.
